canonical_definition: A multimodal evaluation framework that assesses both explicit and implicit social biases in Vision-Language Models through four scenarios: multiple-choice questions, yes-no comparisons, image descriptions, and form completion tasks.
papers: Reliable Evaluation and Benchmarks for Statement Autoformalization

relationships.paper: Reliable Evaluation and Benchmarks for Statement Autoformalization
relationships.evidence: We propose VISBIAS, which detects both explicit biases (multiple-choice/yes-no questions) and implicit biases (image description/form-completion tasks).
